tasks.name: system_status
tasks.description: Show CPU load, memory usage, and disk usage of the root filesystem.
args: echo '== uptime =='; uptime; echo; echo '== memory =='; free -h; echo; echo '== disk =='; df -h /

tasks.name: tail_log
tasks.description: Tail the last N lines of a log file on disk.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the log file

tasks.name: list_downloads
tasks.description: List the files currently in the Downloads directory, newest first.

tasks.name: latest_screenshots
tasks.description: Send the most recent screenshots from the screenshots folder.

tasks.name: send_journal
tasks.description: Send the current systemd journal as a file, optionally filtered by service.
args: if [ -n "{service}" ]; then journalctl -u "{service}" -n {lines} --no-pager > /tmp/teletasks-journal.txt; else journalctl -n {lines} --no-pager > /tmp/teletasks-journal.txt; fi

tasks.name: take_webcam_photo
tasks.description: Capture a still frame from the default webcam and send it.
